headline: GTA VI finally gets a price tag
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI standard edition is priced at $79.99. The Ultimate Edition will cost $99.99. Preorders for PS5 and Xbox Series X/S start tonight at midnight local time.

headline: Bob Iger’s Disney wanted Apple, Twitter, and 007
summary: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger revealed past ambitions in an exit interview. Disney explored potential mergers with tech giants Apple and Twitter. Efforts were also made to acquire the rights to the James Bond franchise.

headline: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day has begun, offering significant discounts on robot vacuums. Deals are available on various tested models from top brands. Both Amazon and other retailers are participating in the sales event.

headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day is delivering unprecedented deals on Apple products this year. The Apple Watch Series 11 has reached a new record-low price. AirPods Pro 3 are also available at a record-low $169, including at Walmart.

headline: Grand Theft Auto 6 Physical Copies Won't Include a Disc, Will Just Be a Code in a Box
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 physical editions will not contain a game disc. Instead, buyers will receive a box with a digital download code inside. This signals a shift towards digital-only for future "physical" game releases.

headline: GTA 6 Preorders Kick Off Midnight Local Time on June 25, Ultimate Edition and Preorder Bonuses Confirmed
summary: Preorders for GTA 6 are set to begin at midnight local time on June 25th. An Ultimate Edition has been confirmed, likely featuring exclusive content. Additional preorder bonuses will be available for early buyers.

headline: Daredevil: Born Again Fans React to Return of Controversial Character From Original Netflix Series
summary: Fans are buzzing about a controversial character's return in Daredevil: Born Again. The character's initial portrayal in the Netflix series divided viewers. Their comeback is sparking renewed discussion and excitement among the fanbase.

headline: Kadokawa Should Be Making More Money From Elden Ring, Activist Investor Says as CEO Survives Shareholder Vote
summary: Kadokawa's CEO retained his position after a contentious shareholder vote. An activist investor argues the company underperformed on Elden Ring's success. Pressure is mounting for Kadokawa to better monetize its hit gaming titles.

headline: The UK's summers are getting hotter - but how prepared are we?
summary: UK summers are projected to reach 40°C regularly within decades due to climate trends. The article questions the nation's readiness for increasingly extreme heatwaves. Concerns are rising about infrastructure and public health preparedness for hotter conditions.

headline: Police took eight minutes to find Henry Nowak's fatal stab wound
summary: Henry Nowak, a Southampton student, died from a stab wound while in police custody. Officers took eight minutes to discover his fatal injury after he was handcuffed. The incident raises questions about police procedures and medical attention during arrest.

headline: Burnham likely to replace Reeves as chancellor if he becomes PM
summary: Andy Burnham is tipped to become Chancellor if he were to become Prime Minister. Current shadow chancellor Rachel Reeves would reportedly be offered a less senior cabinet post. This suggests a significant reshuffle in potential future government leadership roles.

headline: Ten years on, Brexit's economic impact is becoming clearer
summary: A decade after the vote, Brexit's long-term economic effects are now emerging. Economists initially warned of sustained damage from leaving the EU. The article examines the actual economic consequences that have unfolded.
